title: myosotis propinqua
intro: Myosotis propinqua, also known as the New Zealand forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, Australia, and Tasmania. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to help with wound healing and reducing swelling. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Myosotis propinqua often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of stress and promote overall well-being.
